events.description: Appointment for Water Heater Inspection & Repair. Service address: 456 Homeowner Drive, Santa Clara, CA 95050. Technician: Mike Rodriguez (will call 30 minutes before arrival). Diagnostic fee: $89 (waived if you proceed with repair). Written estimate provided before work. All repairs come with a 1-year warranty. Need to reschedule? Call (408) 555-PIPE or reply to this email.
